holdings.n: U.S. Bank Money Market Deposit Account

overview.description: The SanJac Alpha Low Duration ETF (SJLD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is actively managed, aiming to provide current income while preserving capital and ensuring daily liquidity by investing in short-term, investment-grade US government debts. SJLD was launched on Sep 10, 2024 and is issued by SanJac Alpha.
